'''√r-ng-r''' ('''rangara''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:duchen|duchen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ng-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:duchen|duchen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √r-ng-r
|-
! Lemma
| rangara
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rangarithi|rangarithi]] || [[word:rangariji|rangariji]] || [[word:rangarishi|rangarishi]] || [[word:rangari|rangari]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rangaruthuth|rangaruthuth]] || [[word:rangarujuj|rangarujuj]] || [[word:rangarushush|rangarushush]] || [[word:rangar|rangar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rangaruthu|rangaruthu]] || [[word:rangaruju|rangaruju]] || [[word:rangarushu|rangarushu]] || [[word:rangaru|rangaru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rangarufuth|rangarufuth]] || [[word:rangarufuj|rangarufuj]] || [[word:rangarufush|rangarufush]] || [[word:rangaruf|rangaruf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rangarethe|rangarethe]] || [[word:rangareje|rangareje]] || [[word:rangareshe|rangareshe]] || [[word:rangare|rangare]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rangarothoth|rangarothoth]] || [[word:rangarojoj|rangarojoj]] || [[word:rangaroshosh|rangaroshosh]] || [[word:rangar|rangar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rangarotho|rangarotho]] || [[word:rangarojo|rangarojo]] || [[word:rangarosho|rangarosho]] || [[word:rangaro|rangaro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rangarofoth|rangarofoth]] || [[word:rangarofoj|rangarofoj]] || [[word:rangarofosh|rangarofosh]] || [[word:rangarof|rangarof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rangarïf|rangarïf]] || [[word:rangarïf|rangarïf]] || [[word:rangarïf|rangarïf]] || [[word:rangarïf|rangarïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rangarïfïf|rangarïfïf]] || [[word:rangarïfïf|rangarïfïf]] || [[word:rangarïfïf|rangarïfïf]] || [[word:rangarïfïf|rangarïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rangarïf|rangarïf]] || [[word:rangarïf|rangarïf]] || [[word:rangarïf|rangarïf]] || [[word:rangarïf|rangarïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rangarïf|rangarïf]] || [[word:rangarïf|rangarïf]] || [[word:rangarïf|rangarïf]] || [[word:rangarïf|rangarïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rangaræthæ|rangaræthæ]] || [[word:rangaræjæ|rangaræjæ]] || [[word:rangaræshæ|rangaræshæ]] || [[word:rangaræ|rangaræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rangarathath|rangarathath]] || [[word:rangarajaj|rangarajaj]] || [[word:rangarashash|rangarashash]] || [[word:rangar|rangar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rangaratha|rangaratha]] || [[word:rangaraja|rangaraja]] || [[word:rangarasha|rangarasha]] || [[word:rangara|rangara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rangarafath|rangarafath]] || [[word:rangarafaj|rangarafaj]] || [[word:rangarafash|rangarafash]] || [[word:rangaraf|rangaraf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:rangarasha|rangarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gorangarasha|gorangarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokirangarasha|gokirangarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:rangarnüsha|rangarnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gorangarnknüsha|gorangarnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokirangarnüsha|gokirangarnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rangarshësha|rangarshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorangarnkshësha|gorangarnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirangarshësha|gokirangarshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rangarrosha|rangarrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorangarnkrosha|gorangarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirangarrosha|gokirangarrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rangarmusha|rangarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gorangarnkmusha|gorangarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirangarmusha|gokirangarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:rangarsherasha|rangarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gorangarnksherasha|gorangarnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokirangarsherasha|gokirangarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:rangarngasha|rangarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gorangarnkngasha|gorangarnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokirangarngasha|gokirangarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rangaryasha|rangaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gorangarnkyasha|gorangarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokirangaryasha|gokirangaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:rangaryamasha|rangaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gorangarnkyamasha|gorangarnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokirangaryamasha|gokirangaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:rangarnüshësha|rangarnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorangarnknüshësha|gorangarnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirangarnüshësha|gokirangarnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rangarnürosha|rangarnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorangarnknürosha|gorangarnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirangarnürosha|gokirangarnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rangarnümusha|rangarnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorangarnknümusha|gorangarnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirangarnümusha|gokirangarnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:rangarshënüsha|rangarshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorangarnkshënüsha|gorangarnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirangarshënüsha|gokirangarshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rangarshërosha|rangarshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorangarnkshërosha|gorangarnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirangarshërosha|gokirangarshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rangarshëmusha|rangarshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorangarnkshëmusha|gorangarnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirangarshëmusha|gokirangarshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:rangarronüsha|rangarronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorangarnkronüsha|gorangarnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirangarronüsha|gokirangarronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:rangarroshësha|rangarroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorangarnkroshësha|gorangarnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirangarroshësha|gokirangarroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rangarromusha|rangarromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorangarnkromusha|gorangarnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirangarromusha|gokirangarromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:rangarmunüsha|rangarmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorangarnkmunüsha|gorangarnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirangarmunüsha|gokirangarmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:rangarmushësha|rangarmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorangarnkmushësha|gorangarnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirangarmushësha|gokirangarmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rangarmurosha|rangarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorangarnkmurosha|gorangarnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirangarmurosha|gokirangarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:rangar|rangar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:rængær|rængær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:horangar|horangar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:horængær|horængær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorangar|hohorangar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorængær|hohorængær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nürangar|nürangar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nürængær|nürængær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünürangar|nünürangar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünürængær|nünürængær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïrangar|nïrangar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïrængær|nïrængær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïrangar|nïnïrangar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïrængær|nïnïrængær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lurangar|lurangar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lurængær|lurængær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurangar|lulurangar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurængær|lulurængær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lirangar|lirangar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lirængær|lirængær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirangar|lilirangar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirængær|lilirængær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:korangar|korangar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:korængær|korængær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorangar|kokorangar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorængær|kokorængær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kerangar|kerangar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kerængær|kerængær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerangar|kekerangar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerængær|kekerængær]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
